name: CH32L103G8R6
description: Generated from the WCH CH32L103 parser pipeline for CH32L103G8R6 QSOP28. Includes synthesized routing extracted from Table 2-1-1 CH32L103 Pin definitions. CH32L103G8R6 is a CH32L103 MCU in a 28-pin QSOP28 package. This generated definition includes 21 peripheral blocks covering ADC with 10 input channels, CAN, 2 I2C buses, 1 op-amp, USB full-speed, 2 SPI buses, and 4 serial ports.
